description: The strangest thing isn’t what you see—it’s what you can’t. John's life is ordinary. A steady job. A loving marriage. Until something impossible happens, and it’s only the beginning. Moments of unexplained dread. Time behaving in ways it shouldn’t. And the unsettling sense that something, or someone, is watching. As the experiences intensify, John and Cassie find themselves pulled into a mystery that defies logic and threatens everything they know about reality. From Suffolk’s quiet streets to the edges of perception itself, What You Can’t See is a tense, atmospheric blend of psychological suspense and science fiction that will keep you questioning what’s real… long after you’ve turned the final page. Perfect for fans of: Reality-bending thrillers Unsettling, character-driven mysteries The eerie twists of Blake Crouch and the atmosphere of Stephen King Scroll up and get your copy today — before reality changes again.
